name: linear
description: Linear API client tools for issue management, team collaboration, and project tracking

tools.name: linear_get_viewer
tools.description: Get authenticated user information. Use this to verify authentication and get the current user's ID.

tools.name: linear_list_teams
tools.description: List all teams in the workspace. Use this to get team IDs needed for creating issues.

first.description: Number of teams to return (default: 50, max: 250)

after.description: Cursor for pagination (from previous response's pageInfo.endCursor)

tools.name: linear_list_issues
tools.description: List issues with pagination. Returns up to 'first' issues. Use pageInfo.endCursor for next page.

first.description: Number of issues to return (default: 50, max: 250)

after.description: Cursor for pagination. Get from previous response's pageInfo.endCursor. Omit for first page.

tools.name: linear_get_issue
tools.description: Get a single issue by ID. Returns full issue details including title, description, state, assignee, etc.

id.description: Issue UUID (not the issue number). Get from linear_list_issues or linear_search_issues.

tools.name: linear_search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues by text query. Supports search operators like 'priority:urgent', 'assignee:me', 'state:started'.

query.description: Search query with optional operators: priority:urgent, state:started, assignee:me, label:bug

first.description: Number of results to return (default: 50, max: 250)

tools.name: linear_create_issue
tools.description: ⚠️ MUTABLE: Create a new issue. This will create a new issue in Linear. Always confirm with user before executing. Requires teamID (get from linear_list_teams). All other fields are optional.

assigneeID.description: User UUID to assign. Get from linear_list_users or linear_get_viewer.

stateID.description: Workflow state UUID. Get from linear_list_workflow_states. Must belong to same team.

labelIds.description: Array of label UUIDs. Get from linear_list_labels.

parentID.description: Parent issue UUID for creating sub-issues. Must be in same team.

tools.name: linear_update_issue
tools.description: ⚠️ MUTABLE: Update an existing issue. This will modify the issue in Linear. Always confirm with user before executing. All fields are optional. Omitted fields remain unchanged. Empty string for assigneeID unassigns the issue.

assigneeID.description: New assignee UUID (empty string to unassign)

labelIds.description: Replace all labels with this array

tools.name: linear_delete_issue
tools.description: ⚠️ DESTRUCTIVE: Delete an issue permanently. This action CANNOT be undone. The issue and all its comments, attachments, and history will be permanently removed. Always confirm with user before executing.

id.description: Issue UUID to delete (WARNING: permanent deletion)

tools.name: linear_list_workflow_states
tools.description: List all workflow states (e.g., Todo, In Progress, Done). Use to get state IDs for creating/updating issues.

tools.name: linear_list_users
tools.description: List all users in the workspace. Use to get user IDs for assigning issues.

first.description: Number of users to return (default: 50, max: 250)

tools.name: linear_list_labels
tools.description: List all issue labels. Use to get label IDs for applying to issues.

tools.name: linear_create_comment
tools.description: ⚠️ MUTABLE: Add a comment to an issue. This will create a new comment in Linear. Always confirm with user before executing. Supports markdown formatting.

tools.name: linear_list_comments
tools.description: List comments for an issue or all comments with pagination.

AuthenticationError.description: Invalid or expired LINEAR_API_KEY. Get a new key from https://linear.app/settings/account/security

ForbiddenError.description: Missing required permission. Check API key scopes (Read vs Write).

RateLimitError.description: Rate limit exceeded. Linear allows ~2 requests/second sustained. Retry after indicated seconds.

create_issue_workflow.description: Complete workflow for creating an issue
steps: 3. (Optional) Call linear_get_viewer or linear_list_users to get assigneeID
4. Call linear_create_issue with teamID and other fields
3. Call linear_update_issue with id and fields to change
